Off Calendar Apr-27-2004 Set For Trial On Oct-18-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-01-04 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Peterson-Mullin Construction, Inc.'s motion to request Mediation in lieu of court ordered Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Jury Trial date set on Oct-18-2004 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of time and place of trial and mandatory settlement conference. Court ordered a Mediation OSC set on Jul-14-2004 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR # 9225 (212)
